title: Correct AI Cockpit design philosophy acceptance findings

sources.reason: Repository rules requiring a new correction Work Item for post-archive corrections and complete verification evidence.
Archived evidence containing the template residual-risk placeholder that must be corrected through a new Work Item rather than edited in place.
Authoritative page containing the two language-consistency findings to correct.
Terminology source for human-agent collaboration, calibrated trust, and governance boundaries.

problemStatement: Acceptance identified three correctable defects in the prior Work Item: a template residual-risk placeholder in the archived Summary, a stale PR baseline that included unrelated release changes, and two unmarked Chinese passages in the authoritative Japanese philosophy page.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The authoritative philosophy page uses coherent Japanese prose while retaining the requested English headings and source quotation.
The correction Work Item records the actual residual risk without modifying the prior archived Summary.
evidence: Scope check excluding prior archive records

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The PR diff is based on the latest origin/main and contains no unrelated release workflow or test changes.
Runtime behavior, schemas, compatibility redirects, and product capabilities remain unchanged.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This is a documentation and governance-record correction only.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only correction; risks are limited to language consistency, archive immutability, and PR ownership evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The reviewer findings, correction scope, archive immutability boundary, and verification evidence are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the prior archive is unchanged, the Japanese page contains no unmarked Chinese prose, and the PR base excludes unrelated release changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The authoritative philosophy page replaces the mixed-language collaboration phrase with coherent Japanese and replaces the Chinese architect translation with the requested Japanese translation.
The correction Summary records actual residual risks and does not contain template placeholder text; the prior archived Summary and Contract remain byte-for-byte unchanged.
The branch is rebased onto the latest origin/main, and the PR aggregate identifies only this correction Work Item and its intended files.
No runtime behavior, schema, compatibility redirect, release workflow, or test file is changed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: 验收发现上一项文档修改的交接证据仍有模板占位内容，权威日文页面有未标注中文混入，且 PR 基线落后于最新 origin/main，导致治理聚合包含无关 release 变更。需要在不修改旧归档的前提下，用新的纠正 Work Item 固化真实风险并收敛 PR 差分。
constraints: 不得直接修改 .ai/work-items/archive/2026/articulate_design_philosophy.summary.json 或其 Contract；旧归档必须保持不变。
docs/philosophy/design-philosophy.md 使用日文正文，可保留英文标题和英文原文；不得将中文翻译直接混入日文正文。
只修正文案与本次纠正 Work Item 证据；不修改运行时、Schema、兼容入口、release workflow、测试或产品能力。
intent.rationale: 将归档缺陷作为新的可审计纠正项记录，既保留原始历史，又让实际残余风险和语言决策成为后续评审可验证的 Repository Truth；同步最新主线则确保 PR 只表达本任务。

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
